interpretation.why_not_complete: This uses the full trained public-data diffusion checkpoint and applies cost gradients inside a 20-step reverse loop, which is closer to the paper inference algorithm than one-shot offline guidance. The audit records whether task costs improve under the chosen offline start mode rather than forcing a success claim. It still is not closed-loop Isaac/robot execution, does not use the unpublished official coefficient schedule, and does not reproduce TensorRT/asynchronous deployment or Fig. 5/Fig. 6 videos.

scope: Full public-data paper-architecture diffusion checkpoint evaluated in a 20-step reverse-denoising loop with classifier-guidance task-cost gradients applied inside each denoising iteration.
